subject: Computer Networking
title: Phishing Detection
description: Learn Phishing Detection in one minute.

hook.text: The email looks exactly like your bank. The link goes to a fake site. Phishing detection catches it.

buildup.text: Filters check URLs against known phishing databases. They also analyze visual similarity to real sites.

discovery.text: Machine learning models examine tone, urgency, and sender patterns. 'Your account will be locked' is a red flag.

twist.text: Spear phishing targets individuals with personal details. Generic filters miss these. Context is needed.

climax.text: Modern filters sandbox links — opening them in a virtual browser to check for credential harvesting pages.

punchline.text: Phishing detection layers rules, ML, and sandboxing. Defense in depth.

quiz.question: What does link sandboxing do in phishing detection?
options: Opens links in a virtual browser to check for threats
Blocks all links in every email
